name: Molded Rhubarb Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
2. Place over very low heat.
3. Cover and let come to boiling point without stirring or adding any additional water.
4. When the rhubarb has simmered until tender, remove from heat and add the strawberry gelatin.
5. Stir until the gelatin is fully dissolved, then add cold water and lemon juice.
6. Allow to cool, then chill until it starts to thicken.
7. Fold in the diced celery.
8. Pour into individual molds and chill until firm.
9. Unmold onto lettuce leaves and garnish with mayonnaise.
